title: BlockShade
description: BlockShade is a build-focused modpack that combines incredible construction mods with stunning shaders to turn your Minecraft creations into true visual masterpieces.
body:
## Blockshade is a modpack to Unite some of the best mods I've ever seen to build! 
  Tranform you building experience with a plethora of construction mods, designed to enhance you creativity and efficency. 
Enjoy the integrated shaderpacks that elevate the aesthetic of your builds to new heights. 
 Experience improved gameplay with many QOL mods. 

This modpack includes some mods that required at least an entry-level GPU or mid-range to appreciate the mods to their fullest. 
##   This modpack is in release but if you have questions or request feel free to contact me on discord Izouku ;) 

  **TO EXPORT A RECORDING WITH FLASHBACK YOU NEED TO USE THE FLASHBACK VERSION !!! Because of a lot of incompatibilities when I first made this pack this wasn't fixed by FlashBack.** 

### There are 3 versions of this modpack:
1.    All in one : 
         Includes mods that add new blocks.
2.    Raw : 
         Contains only modded tools and some QOL mods (including commands mods). 
3.    Flashback : 
         Consists of the minimum mods needed to process records made with the Raw or AllInOne versions.
